creator: kristinacors
caption: Add this to your bucket list while you’re in the Hamptons this summer #travelbucketlist #thehamptons #summerinthehamptons #thingstodointhehamptons #travelcontentcreator

transcription.text: Things to do in the Hamptons. Check out this vineyard. It's in Sagaponik and you can take a guided tour for about two hours or just sit back and enjoy their a la carte tasting menu. The name of this vineyard is Vulfer Estate. Follow for more things to do in the Hamptons.
